_reason: Pre-step baseline capture requires local fixture DB on :5434 and Ollama qwen2.5:7b-instruct. Deferred per subagent working rules. This baseline is the pre-PR-2 planner eval snapshot used as the non-regression floor for pr2-messy-v1.json. Run manually (from main branch before merging PR2): DATABASE_URL=postgresql://raguser:ragpass@localhost:5434/ragdb OBJECT_STORAGE_PROVIDER=local OBJECT_STORAGE_DEV_PRESIGN_SECRET=dummy .venv/bin/python scripts/evaluate_planned_search.py evals/query_planner_messy_v1.yaml --reranker-device cpu --json > reports/pr2-baseline-messy-v1.json

_gate.description: Record aggregate.hit_delta_sum and aggregate.fallback_rate from this file as the Task-10 gate floors
